specific_question: What was the impact of implementing the virtual showroom feature in 2024 on sales conversion rates?
answer: After launching the virtual showroom feature technology in May 2024, Elexion Automotive's sales conversion rate increased from 2.3% to 4.1% by October 2024.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
